Full_Review: Very comfortable
Room was hot aircon not working so a fan was used instead The window remained open all weekend to cool room down Luckily it wasn t hot outside  Comfy bed great bathroom

Room size incredibly small which made stay uncomfortable Air conditioner not working which also wasn t helpful Stairs to upper floors incredibly steep and difficult  Lovely staff great breakfast and wifi

Room in the top floor was very small   Breakfast was extremely good A lot better than most View to a canal was beautiful Good location somewhat long walking distance from everywhere in central Amsterdam

Nice small hotel at very good place Close to the centre close to tram stop and restaurants Very tasty and fresh breakfast friendly staff Nice view from the window channel side very quite room Problem could appear if you do not like steep chairs

Unfortunately the AC in our room was not working and we were given a cooling fan which was quite noisy and we decided not to use it So we ended up sleeping with the windows open and had to bear the traffic noise from the street at night  Good staff and service The hotel was recently renovated so the room was very clean and well maintained We stayed in a suite and the size was quite good for European standards The complimentary breakfast was great and worth it The location was good as well not in the city centre but still a walking distance or tram ride away from the museums and other tourist attractions

Wish we had know about the three flights of stairs prior to our visit or given the choice of a lower floor We travelled from the US and hoped we might have had a view of the canal Our friends who reserved their room long after we had made our reservation had a rather swanky room with a sensational canal view for their two night stay   Not sure we envisioned three very tall flights of stairs when we booked this hotel We stayed for a week and were surprised that they chose to give a long term guest the most inaccessible room The room itself was fine The breakfast was lovely The hotel seems somewhat short staffed as the women who checked us in was also the woman helping at breakfast and also carried the luggage both up and down the stairs She is a real gem and hope the hotel knows how lucky they are to have such a dedicated employee

Overall Amsterdam is an expensive city and the hotel is no exception Downside of the canal in front of the window are the mosquitos you ll have to face if you leave the window open in summer Mattresses were too soft for our taste   Very friendly and helpful staff nice breakfast and buffet open until 11 00 am which is quite convenient nice atomsphere and style of the room The view from our room to the Gracht canal was well worth some extra money

Air conditioning didn t work had ugly machine with vent out the window to try and cool down room which meant u couldn t close the window so very noisy or very hot and not so noisy as soundproofing could be better when windows were closed hot breakfast was very good but didn t replenish croissant etc at 10 am even though breakfast wasn t finished till 11 am  Room was very spacious bed extremely large and very comfortable we stayed in a suite bathroom modern very good facilities

There s no elevator or lift in the hotel if you bring big luggage and get the highest floor it will be a big trouble like me since I travelled with my mommy older people Fortunately hotel staffs really helpful in bringing our 2 big luggage to hotel room but my mom still complained because she still need to climb up to reach our hotel room  The staffs really great superb also the breakfast also good The location in the centre of city near to tram

The bathroom could have been more private with the frosted glass not covering the area fully It didn t matter though we were family but could have bothered some people   The staff were so friendly and helpful and the breakfast was fantastic they even did bubbles

Only issues we had was that we were not happy with the quality of the cleaning and the replacement of new bed sheet toiletries   Location Breakfast is great Staff is very helpful The front lady was nice enough to take our heavy bag all the way to the top we had issue with the hot water and they attended within a few hours by replacing the entire shower set which we thought was very impressive

The location was a good twenty minute walk from the main square and around a further ten minutes to get to central staition on top of that if you don t mind a bit of walking then there s no real down point to this place  Very modern and nicely styled bedroom very plain layout with two beds and a bathroom and mini fridge with some complementary soft drinks

The bed was too soft and the room pretty small Had to go out to the next building to have breakfast   The room was very clean Friendly staff Location wasn t too bad the room was quiet last floor and view to the canal
The residence has no elevator so you have to climb very narrow stairs with a suitcase we were on the top floor   We loved the location and the service of the staff as well as the food

Too hot with windows closed at night time and so many mosquitos with windows opened   Visually beautiful Loved the decor and the beautiful bathrooms Wonderful breakfast Complimentary fridge Wonderful customer service

We had a standard canal view room which was gorgeous and so efficiently laid out We barely spent any time in the room other than to sleep so the rooms smallness didn t hinder us at all but I would not recommend more than 2 people to stay in it There was a strange smell in the room just barely detectable I think it might be the canal though The three flights of stairs were no issue at all for us who are in shape and pack light but might be for others   The staff were extremely accommodating and polite It was actually the only time in Amsterdam that we encountered such nice people Also we think they might also all be models The breakfast was delicious We loved having our windows open and woke up every morning to birds singing on the quiet canal

Amazing people working at this hotel always trying to make you feel comfortable and they re very friendly and welcoming The location is great too quiet in a nice neighborhood but very close to main locations The hotel itself is classy and very comfortable Loved it definitely recommend it

No air conditioning in the rooms We had to change the rooms THREE times There was no air conditioning in the first room we we given on the 3rd floor was very tiny and very hot The hostess proposed to have the window located behind our bed open This did not sound like a confortable sleeping arrangement to us so we asked for a cooler room and were given a second chance The room was on ground level big but hotter than the previous one perhaps 28C On our request the host opened the window just a little bit it was impossible to open the window more because of it s position The tram lines are located on the street the room was facing and garbage bins are located under the room Not confortable and very noisy all night Our booking was for five nights so we requested a better room or our money back The manager offered another room kindly explained that this is the last room change and that the weather is a bit hotter than usual in Amsterdam 22C is not hot in anyone s terms The third room had no aircon but a small window that we kept open during the night It was manageable but NOT confortable After all we came on holidays to Amsterdam and we wanted a confortable room What is disappointing is the fact that back in March 2016 we enquired if the room that we have booked had an aircon and received an email confirmation on the 26 March from Emma K stating YES Other issues The hairdrier is attached to the wall in the bathroom and a button has to be pressed on non stop while drying the hair These style of hairdryers belong well back to the past I preffer to sit while drying my hair not to stand in a hot bathroom pressing a button The floor of the shower cabin floor is sleek and slippery No tissue paper ear buds or cotton balls are available in the bathroom In my opinion this cute hotel would be good for younger audiences and perhaps more for guests accustomed to European standards of hotel services   The hotel staff hosts were very accomodating and kind always happy to assist with our requests and enquiries and always with a big smile on their faces Thank you all for that The hotel location is perfect the view on the canal peaceful and quite charming The room decor is cute and chic

Shower room is not discreet for travelling with friends There is gaps where you can see through   Room was very big and spaceious Everywhere was very clean We arrived and the guy think his name was Yelly was very friendly and help us loads

Hotel has a lovely terrace but you can t eat or drink on it Morning staff were noisy Adjoining family room very small for 2 teenagers   The bed was extremely comfortable breakfast was excellent our room had a lovely view over the canal excellent tram connections outside hotel to both Museum District and City centre

Breakfast could be more international Wireless is weak Stairs were painted and wet while checkout at 12 00pm and it was hard to carry the luggages and trying to watch out the painted furnitures down by the narrow path   Nice for a short stay Comfortable rooms
Air Conditioner not working in room  Nice bathroom and comfy beds good location easy access to trams Room nice and had small connected room with single bed
For the room change they charged 35 as a cleaning fee although we were downgraded And the garage was very very small   we had the opportunity to change the room bec it was way too noisy

the complementary trip through the canals which we had not expected but enjoyed immensely We knew breakfast was included but only when we went down the first day did we learn that we could order a hot breakfast at no additional charge Each of the staff we met were nice young and helpful

This hotel seems to get better each time I stay I love the location the staff the quality and comfort of the rooms I also love that I am not paying for any amenities which I am not using there is no pool restaurant or large public spaces The hotel is intimate quiet and has exactly what I need a nice place to have a decent breakfast in the mornings a quiet place to enjoy a drink in the afternoons with beautiful views on a tranquil canal a short walk from some of the most beautiful museums in the world The hotel is delightful the staff are wonderfully attentive and the location is perfect for exploring some of the nicest parts of Amsterdam It is simply a perfect boutique hotel

Rooms are beyond small tiny tiny and with a bathroom in it imagine the smallest studio room and it s smaller They have NO air conditioning working in this property even though the kit is installed they say it s not operational The rooms heat up and your only option is to open the window which then brings in flies from the canal which suck your blood during the night and you wake up with huge bites The property has no stairs so you have to walk up seriously steep stairs every time trust me this gets tiring even for fit people They have a minibar in the room which they don t tell you is free until you check out staff member tells us this is so you drink in the bar so why have a free minibar The place is just overly cramped tiny rooms stuffy and uncomfortable It is not a 4 star not even close 2 star definitely and at a push a 3 star Would never stay here again and we are far from the type who complain  Nothing

One member of staff wasn t very pleasant and let the whole team down   Pancakes amazing Bed extremely comfy Most staff went over and above One member of staff wasn t very pleasant and let the whole team down

The staircases were very narrow but the staff was more than willing to carry our heavy suitcases   The staff is very professional friendly and accommodating The breakfast buffet was outstanding and the complimentary boat tour was excellent

The only negative is the noise from the street in case of city view so take your ear plugs with you   Deluxe rooms are very comfy and large Every morning we had very good breakfast you can order cooked one as well eggs pancakes etc The hotel offers private boat trip in Amsterdam canals for free only for tip it was perfect also the staff is very helpful

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Although we enjoy our breakfast on our many visits the toasting machine drives us crazy The machine you use must cost a fortune to run why not a simple toaster Our stay on this occasion was rather marred by the necessity to request a change of room which was dealt with promptly and efficiently The extreme temperature on this occasion being a SW facing room rather defeated the capacity of the air conditioning and a supplementary Fan Finally I usually book my stay by keying in to a regular user screen This time I came confused by what seemed to be a rogue site Booking com This company was eventually explained on check in With the current concern with internet fraud one gets a bit nervous in such circumstances

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Small rooms but this is the centre of London and I was really only there to sleep   Located right right next to Trafalgar Square and National Gallery easy walk to all theatres in the Haymarket 1 minute walk to Leicester Square and about 4 minutes to Piccadilly tube station so easy access to Piccadilly line for return journey home via Heathrow Delightful friendly helpful staff nothing was too much trouble Comfortable bed Good room service food Received free upgrade to larger room without asking Would definitely return for location alone

Full_Review: The room smelt like smoke and the toilet didn t flush properly which meant it dripped through the night   The staff were very friendly and helpful and the location is excellent only a 30 second walk from Trafalgar Square and the tube

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: nothing  The Prosecco was the best ever The facilities location and customer service were of a very high standard We will book again for our next visit

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Tiny rooms and terrible design in regards to luggage storage no room at all for it and we were tripping over suitcases and we pack lightly We transferred to the Hilton on Queen s Gate after a few days the room was the same size but they put a lot of thought into having nightstand storage and a luggage cabinet in the room   Bed comfy staff friendly location excellent very clean and quiet

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: There was a funny smell in the room It smelled slightly of sewage but once in the room for a while you didn t notice it Maybe a drain problem   Excellent location friendly staff and comfortable room

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Dirty carpet incredibly unfriendly and unhelpful staff bathroom is super small and so was the room squeaky floors   The location is okay but crowded and hard to get to and in a dark alley with no views

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The only thing we found wrong with this type of room I E A junior suite the bathroom was too small no room to move around   The hotel was situated in the right place Met with all my requirements

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Very outdated no bar and a very small seating area in reception My room 603 looked straight into the windows of around five other rooms Much better hotels in London for that sort of money   Not much

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Although the overall impression of the hotel was of moderate luxury I thought more could be done to develop the restaurant and bar facilities   The location and the room were excellent

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Room was replenished after our first day with only one towel which we didn t realise till after my husband finished his shower No replenishment of tea coffee milk etc A nuisance rather than a drama but it s the small things that let down what could have been a 100 experience   Responsive friendly staff for any issue Comfortable small bar area to meet friends before heading to the theatre again with good staff Excellent location for accessing all that London has to offer

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Quite expensive and a good size room is hit and miss this time I was lucky but on previous occasions my room was very small However this trip was great   Nice staff good room great breakfast and perfect location Car park if required

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I think the hotel could offer a choice of continental or full English breakfast as it was the same price no matter what you wanted to eat But the staff were very helpful and offered us a coffee and Danish for 5 instead of 12  Rooms very clean and well heated

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Very comfortable Hotel conveniently situated for theatre visits I liked the relaxed atmosphere within the hotel and the helpfulness of the staff Very nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: it was not worth 240 a night it was mediocre I have been to much better hotels for half the price i had to ask for more tea bags as 2 are not enough for 2 nights so they gave me 4   it was very central

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The room was very underwhelming Whilst I felt the location was good this was extremely overpriced The bathroom was smaller than that of student accommodation   The location was good

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Breakfast was extra but no problem there s a Pret and a Costa a short walk in either direction   Great hotel very clean Located on a quiet street tucked away in the heart of central London excellent base for tourists who want to be in the middle of the action This is a very busy area but close to many sites We were able to walk to Piccadilly Circus Covent Garden Trafalgar Square Oxford Sreet Buckingham Palace etc

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Step going down to lifts in reception as it was difficult for my mum s walking aid Staff were very helpful and offered assistance   Great breakfast

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Shower was small and awkward to use Woken up by noise of other guests showering and opening doors There is a building site directly next to the hotel This did not bother us as there were no workers on Sunday but could be an issue during the week  Large comfy bed and really good location

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I thought the room at 211 was expensive for what we got the shower was hard pressure The beds were two singles pushed together so you have a lump in the middle the view was absolutely awful and there was rubbish out on the ledge bit I didn t realise but apparently the guy Fawkes night where people run through the streets was on sat night making the night time rubbish and I hated the room if it was half decent I wouldn t have minded staying in there Staff should warn people of that night and you should make it clear so to sum up hated the room hated the view hated the shower part and hated that I didn t know anything about this firework rampage Not very happy at all I wish I had stayed further out to be honest   The reception staff were welcoming

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Sofa bed was dreadful for my guests I will be writing a letter of complaint about this The hotel rooms were grubby One Reception worker told me I couldn t move room as i wanted to open the windows I slept uncomfortably for three nights then my collleague staying there said her windows Opened so when I asked again they said it was only my floor where the windows did not open Bathroom too small No toilet brush Water not topped up The whole thing was a mess

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The coffee with breakfast was terrible but the food was good at breakfast  excellent for a west end weekend and close enough tot he Mall and Trafalgar square to make an excellent sight seeing trip too Staff wonderful

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: No proper bar  comfy bed and very clean good food very friendly staff The hotel is in an excellent location close to everything Would stay here again

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: No hot water when I arrived And I had to go out and meet people shortly after arrival so wanted to shower first Could not wait for hot water to be fixed Very inconvenient

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: We didn t like the look of the hotel from the outside Some of the staff were either rude or unhelpful We weren t aware that we had no breakfast in our order through Booking com and this was not made clear It made it a very expensive stay The picture we were sent of the room was misleading also and was very much smaller even though it was classed as a king size executive suite   The location was perfect The relationship manager did give us a change of rooms and complimentary prosecco for my partners special birthday I dread to think what the size of the room was like that we originally booked though

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Would have been nice to be able to open a window even if only a tiny bit Would have liked a couple more teabags coffee sachets and milks   Very comfy pillows Lovely bathroom and shower Good and quiet air conditioning

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I am a regular customer and the hotel should have a loyalty card or policy for members this is my 7th time to the hotel and there is no record of my stays

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Bed a bit tight in the room Cleaning of the room after the first night was a bit hit and miss old tea cups left and not cleaned or replaced  Location was good and the staff were very friendley and helpful Nice big shower

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: No frigo bar in the room The room could be more clean especially the windows The price is too much high   Wonderful position Very good wifi The bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: We would have liked breakfast to have been included in the price   Very friendly staff comfy room very close to the theatre we went to quiet for a centre location just what we were looking for The food was also good saved us looking for other places to eat

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Check in and check out seemed to take forever The sink in our room 424 was almost completely blocked draining extremely slowly   Excellent breakfast very pleasant staff no fuss checkout time extension

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: We were only there one night so paid for convenience of the location but had we stayed longer we would have sought a cheaper hotel slightly further away   Staff were friendly and helpful location was superb

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Crazy night person on street yelling at 3 am almost every night we were there Only half a shower door makes wet bath floor after every use Toilet did not flush without having to hold button for entire time and even then it did not flush all the toilet paper down I did have a repair person come to take a look at problem and he said that was the way it worked or didn t really   Great location to National Gallery Tube station resturants and theaters

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I had traveled internationally and need to freshen up and change before my 11am meeting Unfortunately there were no facilities available for me to take a shower and change clothes before my room was ready No gym and the staff would not even allow me to use a shower in a room that had been vacated but not fully cleaned   Room was modern reasonably sized and the bed comfortable

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The bathroom was small   The staff were excellent and offered advice and information without being asked The room was spacious and comfortable Location was excellent and near to 3 tube stations and theatres

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Mould in the shower  The location is great for anyone wanting to check out London Tube resturants etc very close by Can top up your oyster card over the road

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: It was my wife s birthday and the hotel gave us chocolates and red wine thank you so much it really made her day special we then went for food and the theatre

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The room was tiny we couldn t open more than one luggage at a time and considering the price we expected a bit more space  The location was just perfect and the staff was very attentive and helpful

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: No security in elevator with room key Too loud reception did not pick up No password needed for internet so it was insecure Small room  Just ok The Thistle at Kensington gardens is much better

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Bathroom toilet had no space in front of it the room had a stale cigarette smell when I first went in the TV channels were very limited not a smart TV and no access to USB or HDMI ports as mounted into the wall the TV remote was filthy I washed my hands every time I used it in case I caught an infection There was mould in the tile grouting of the shower cubicle Minor things but for the price paid one can t expect luxury   Quiet room on sixth floor they gave me a free upgrade to an executive room huge lovely bed probably super king size great air conditioning decent shower ironing board iron secure safe huge room great views over London the location was the massive draw factor so convenient for all the main London sights restaurants bars galleries etc The staff were very friendly and efficient especially the Indian lady at reception

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I get the feeling the owner doesn t invest enough in property maintenance eg carpet cleaning refurbishing breakfast room furniture breakfast set up disfunctional when it s busy Also there seemed to be junior reception staff on duty with not much back up which made it hard for them as they seemed to be less knowledgeable about helping with travel tourism queries   Breakfast staff and room staff very cheerful

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: We had some difficulty in getting taxis arranged by the staff but that is not their fault We could not understand this as the cabbies in London are pretty mad about UBER so you would think they would be grateful for the call We had one cabbie stop tell us he s the one they called and then tell us he wasn t picking us up No explanation The hotel was also pretty upset about this   The staff was amazing This property is in an EXCELLENT location between Trafalgar Square Leicester Square and the Warrick Theater our first stop Our first room was a bit small it was the room we had booked and the view out the window was not great When we inquired what else was available they showed us a larger king room for a bit more a night which was wonderful I have some mobility issues and the staff was excellent in making sure I was comfortable This room had air conditioning it was super hot in London when we were there elevator and was very well maintained Being American I love my ice and they always accommodated my wishes ice was free in a small amount but we did tip Our room was on the front side of the hotel with a view of the skyline Even so it was amazingly QUIET

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The minibar fridge is available in the suites only All other rooms don t have it   We took a suite and an executive room We like the service that was provided by the kind and helpful staff and the unbeatable location An excellent hotel in 4 star category

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The bed which is bigger than a king size was too big for the room so it was hard to find a place to put our things   The staff was very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Limited tv channels slow room service then no condiments Biscuits could have been provided with tea coffee and more milk cartons Please think of finishing touches   Cleanliness of the room huge comfy bed and stylish bathroom

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The windows were so dirty you could hardly see through them We were given a room which hadn t been cleaned to begin with No mini bar in room Cigarette butts all over ledge in front of window which had been dropped from above   Location was good

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The homeless element was in your face world wide issue their personal toilet habits was the issue to step around not nice but not the hotel s fault  The location was terrific We could walk to all the big ticket tourist attractions like the Thames embankment Buckingham Palace West End shows National Gallery Big Ben Picadilly Circus amidst Trafalgar Square

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The pastries could have been warm instead of cold  the staff are excellent remembered us The best location close to everything Which is why we stay with you every time we are in London

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The lounge bar is now used as a meeting room unacceptable for a 4 star hotel not to even have a bar just chairs in the lobby I used to like to eat in there in the evening There is no BBC4 on TV Could not watch a lot of the Olympics   Location and size of hotel have stayed there many times for this although I think it is overpriced

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: bed was not very comfortable and the facility is quite old They had steps ups and down in the corridors which makes luggage movement a bit hicktek   Staff was nice and helpful and location is just great

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: there was confusion with breakfast service in that was there a free breakfast credit according to check in staff yes but according to breakfast host hostess no so I was never sure The charges were paid by family members staying in an adjacent room so I never saw any charges personally for the meals   Very clean and comfortable and great location

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Our room was not cleaned until 4 30 in the afternoon This was a little inconvenient since we had come back to the room to change for the eventing We had been out all day touring We had to go wait in the lobby for a while until they were finished   This hotel is in a nice location Walking distance to several tube stations and many attractions The staff was very friendly and helpful The rooms were comfortable

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: This hotel had been one of the WORST experiences I ever had They have absolutely no tenant respect and don t know what room privacy is at all They just barge in your room day or night whether you have the Do not disturb sign or not It could be a man a women or the cleaning crew that opens the door without ringing the bell The rooms aren t as website shows the bathroom is literally 2m square and you could forget any maneuvering space You can ignore the hotel restaurants or the room service you re better off getting McDonald s takeaway than eating in here I blame bookings com for their review and images as they were false and misguiding and would never waste my money on this hotel ever again Shame on you bookings com and shame on this hotel that doesn t deserve the Royal or the Hotel in its name

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Overcharged Price charged was nearly 300 more than quoted on booking Com While ut was refunded it was only after I spotted it and should not have happened  Good location good rooms

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Wash basin plug needs adjusting water flows straight through Shower door doesn t close properly allowing water to escape onto the floor Minor problems I know but easy to sort out so should be dealt with   On line booking very easy Staff very helpful Good value breakfast

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The room photograph was misleading When I protested about that I just was told there was nothing they would do about that and that I would have to pay a further 20 a night to upgrade No refrigerator in the room which for that price there should have been Never any response when I rang down for room service Desk staff just incompetent Menu at their restaurant very limited Hall way carpets smelled musty   The room too which I upgraded because the one first offered was tiny was adequate

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Bed was slightly firmer than I like and pillows a bit uncomfortable More my taste than any fault of the hotel   The location of the hotel can t be beaten Right behind the national gallery Decor is simple and modern and we felt at home Shower also great

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Thought price very expensive for what was on offer Breakfast at that price should have been included Bed massive but a little short   Location brilliant for theatre and sightseeing Very large bed Extra paid Well worth it Breakfast although extra very good value

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I did not like that the sofa bed was not made up and they did not have linen provided When we discovered that it was not made I was given a lecture about it being on request only Why have a sofa bed in the room if you don t expect people to use it The other thing was the stairs I had hurt my back a few days prior I even told the check in person but when she gave us our room number there were several sets of stairs to navigate and no one offered to help with my large bag I would have expected that from a luxury hotel which is a brand they use for themselves   I liked that this hotel was located within minutes to the Prince of Wales Theatre it made our late night easy to get home

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The bed was uncomfortable it felt like 2 beds pushed together Check out time was 12 midday however a cleaner tried coming into the room before this time

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Nothing to complain about other than toilet could ve flushed better and bath didn t drain too well   Great location Reasonable price Quiet Comfortable room and friendly helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: 2nd stay here for business 1st time was not too bad so booked again for ease of location for my business visit giving them a second chance Hell never again Upon arrival they didn t have my reservation then asked to see my confirmation about 4 times on my phone making me feel I was some guy who just turned up off the street then was told that the credit card machine was not working so took down my card number and was told this would be processed the next day Following morning when checking out was told to make payment for the room told the receptionist that I had paid when I checked the day before but she told me no payment was processed so gave her card to make payment Later checked my statement to see that I have been charged the first time when I checked in and then charged again checking out Went back to hotel and was told by the receptionist that I will just have to wait 5 days for it to be credited back into my account YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED Double check that you have not been charged twice Overall stay was average stayed in better hotels bathroom very horrible cracked tiles loose grout from the floor tiles horrible dirty yellow stained bath tub and shower curtain TV in room was not looked after remote control not working TV stations is a joke Horrible building site view from window Never be back again   Easy for train and tube

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Very tired place I mean inside and facilities rooms tired and very small curtains cannot be fully used so if you need curtains closed you will have a big problem Stuff is ok but it depends My girlfriend asked for a comb and reply was no In hotel where standard room cost more than 300 GBP this is a joke Another thing is that on one side is construction site and if you get this side eg all suites be sure you will wake up on 7AM It could be a good place if it s for half price otherwise it must be rebuild from scratch to return Breakfast is awful   This hotel may have the best location in London Unfortunately that s all

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Bar service slightly slow coffee and croissants took a while to arrive   We felt welcome and valued were upgraded when we told them we were repeat visitors lovely room Friendly staff Excellent croissants when they eventually arrived

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The bathroom was tiny for an executive King room   The location was great but very expensive hotel There was no breakfast included when I booked and it was 12 per person we walked a couple of mins round the corner it was 4 95 per person

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Couldn t have expected anything better for the price good value hotel Swimming pool and balconies would have been nice but that s not a reasonable expectation for price charged   Good full cooked breakfast comfortable room in good location

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Price tooooooo high but not really worth the price And the bath tab was very very very hard to use The water pressure was either too strong or not stable And the fan in the toilet was not working It seems that the maintenance team didn t come to check it even I had reported And in the first night one of the lamps was not working   Staff are helpful

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: My husband felt the residents bar should ve stayed open longer   This hotel can t be beat for location a stones throw to Trafalgar Square and the National Gallery walking distance to Big Ben and Houses of Parliament Westminster Abbey Whitehall the Mall Buckingham Palace Soho Covent Garden with so many restaurants and bars etc also the main Parks Just a couple of minutes to the tubes Charing cross and Piccadilly staff very helpful and friendly helped us with directions etc also it was our anniversary and we got a room upgrade a card and chocolates very impressed

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Nothing  Stayed here for one night on my birthday On hearing this when we checked in we were upgraded to a bigger room and on our return after a night out found a surprise birthday card and complimentary chocolates in our room Staff went out of their way to be helpful Only a few minutes walk to Leicester Square but on a side street so very quiet Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Had to pay extra for breakfast the dining area was noisy from chair making a noise on the floor staff did not seam to know what they where doing Toilet blocked and was embarrassing to say at reception

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: noisy neighbours on the same floor in the Hotel ongoing construction at the neighbour block Stay at Hotel Restaurant terrace becomes a noisy experience during weekdays in the time period 08 00 17 00  clean and large room executive room friendly and discrete hotel staff center town many touristic attractions within walking distance

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: piccadilly circus tube station has no escalator for luggage Green square does Ok for us but be aware if you have a lot of luggage   Free upgrade due to damaged window in our standard room Highly recommend the junior suite Location was a quite little street just off main areas and so close to everything Centre to liecester sq piccadilly circus and trafalgar sq All within 2 minutes walk

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: N a not a bad word to say   Everything the whole experience was excellent a special thank you to the Royal trafalgar staff for making my fianc birthday special

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: My reading glasses are vanished from the room Be carefull don t leave your stuff around even your glasses We informed the reseption and the reseptionist acted as if this kind of things happen all the time Worst hotel i booked from booking com so far

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Housekeeping did not come to refresh our room until 5pm which was too late as getting ready to go out for the evening Therefore had to use wet towels didn t have enough teabags or bottled water   Location and room 301 was very nice

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Housekeeping wasn t impressive and bathroom sink was extremely small water would go all over the place whenever you wash your hands or face  Location was convenient

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The price of the continental breakfast is crazy over priced when compared to the full English which is also ridiculously expensive I didn t have the choice of a full English as I was running the marathon and had to eat before 7 30   A certain staff member at front of house took extra effort in making sure my small requests were met to help me with my stay with the marathon in mind Thank you

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: For a foreigner it is difficult to understand very fast speaking non english personnel in the reception Everything correct but not a warm feeling However super service from the guy helping to catch a taxi but not so easy to understand him My suggestion is that more attention should be given to the language from some of the staff Or employ british personel   Fantastic location nice rooms

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Hotel is very well located for a visit to the center of London the room was clean although a bit smaller than other rooms we have had on previous visits

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Can t think of anything although I don t know about parking as we travelled by train tube   Room was small but comfortable as was the bed Staff were excellent frendly and helpful but not pushy it was my 60th birthday while we were there and we returned to the room to find a complimentary bottle or wine and a birthday card from the hotel Position is excellent just around the corner from Trafalgar Square

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The food was awful There are Hungarian cooks in the kitchen please let them cook their native foods and the clientele will love the hotel even more and they will not have to fine elsewhere to eat every day   The staff were excellent especially Lily the manager was very professional and always helpful Lazlo was also excellent nothing was too much trouble

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The TV system was not working very well with only a limited range of channels and confusing controls I understand that changes were under way and that all should be fine next time I come   Relatively easy to get around I now have to use a stick and quiet Reasonable menu choices for vegetarians

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Walls are so thin I could here everything my neighbors were talking about Some were shouting and I called the reception to complain but they took no proper action  Location

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I know it s hard to keep food hot but we felt the breakfast could have been warmer   Very helpful staff one member found us a room with a bath very quickly The mattress was just right firm but not rigid We don t normally like sleeping under synthetic bedding but this particular bedding did not make us feel uncomfortable So glad we could open the windows

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Cleanliness of the bedroom bathroom and dining room needed attention Tired furniture soiled voile curtains and not enough storage Breakfast cold and toaster which toasted 1 side only Appreciate excellent location but overpriced for actual accommodation and cold breakfasts   Location

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: We was woken at 6 20 am by what I can only imagine was the shower water system of the room next to us Not very pleasant for a Sunday morning when we was hoping for a lay in It sounded like we was on a runway next to an airplane about to take off Wouldn t stay there again for that reason only but also our room smelt like the sewers when u entered it coming from the bathroom   The room was ok could of been cleaner but comfortable The staff were pleasant thought and left a bottle of wine and chocolates for us on arrival for our Anniversary

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The plates for cooked breakfast were cold despite a notice telling guests to be aware of very hot plates Food was subsequently cold and not good value at 24 for two We should have complained at the time but were in a hurry   Very quiet room on the sixth floor despite some building work locally Staff all very well trained efficient and couldn t do enough to help make our stay enjoyable Room clean and bed comfortable Free wifi much appreciated

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: I had a requested an early check in but when I arrived that was dismissed out of hand he didn t even want to know my name just No   The location is excellent so close to everything Trafalgar Square Soho Whitehall Chinatown Covent Gardens etc are all just steps away really a great location to explore London from The breakfast was good albeit a little expensive if it s not included in your room rate

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The friendly and cheerful greeting by reception staff as soon as you came in was very welcoming and the fact that the hotel included both continental and cooked breakfast was also a bonus

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The stowage in the room could be better not enough place for the cloths in the closet even for just a 3 day trip   The room itself was pretty nice with a comfortable bed and a good bath The staff was friendly and helpful at every point of our stay including the staff at the breakfast And the location is unbeatable just several meters away from Piccadilly and Trafalger Square

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Some of the bedroom furniture is looking a bit old and some of the drawers were sticking but the room was spacious Some noise disturbance with the bins in the mornings  Good breakfast and friendly staff who offered good service The location was very central just off Trafalgar square so we were able to get to the west end very easily

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Price could always be cheaper for my meagre budget   Only an overnight stay therefore didn t use all the facilities nor needed to The staff were very polite and helpful the beds were extremely comfortable and having a hairdryer and iron board in the room was very helpful The breakfast was good also with a choice of full English continental of both I particularly liked being able to check in early and leave our bags after checking which enabled us to sightsee easily before our return trip home

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The king bed in a suite was two twin beds pushed together The drain in the shower had a weird plumbing issue but only for a day   Staff and room service Location

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: rooms are quite small hotel needs some repair and refurbish but I haven t gone there to find super SPA   Super location decent breakfast very friendly staff Wifi connection was easy to connect and quite fast quiet street

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: The bed was hard as a rock   Thistle Trafalgar is an excellent hotel offering modern rooms with lovely bathroom facilities The breakfast is great value for money and the staff friendly and attentive Fabulous location and walking distance to most tourist attractions Close to Leicester Square underground

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar
Full_Review: Wifi was epically slow The bed was at the end of it s life cycle defiantly something to make you reconsider after spending 10 nights there despiste the great location staff and cleanliness the bed is a deal breaker   Great location close to everything and tucked away at the back from a very busy and noisy square you ll defiantly won t have any issues with noisy people on the street late at night

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Hotel_Name: Thistle Trafalgar Square The Royal Trafalgar

Pillows too soft for our liking but no big deal and I m sure they would have sorted it if we d asked   Excellent facilities fantastic room very friendly and attentive staff Best hotel stay in London ever this is now my go to hotel from now on

We felt The Bassoon bar lacked atmosphere and the bloody Mary s were rubbish  Very good outside cigar smoking terrace one of the best in London terrific cigar humidor and collection too On the whole up there with the best hotels in London Great spa facilities

We did wait a little long for the dessert but this was down to an accident in the kitchen where the dessert plate was dropped We were kept informed of this by our waiter Isaac who was excellent Accidents happen so this is not really an issue I would ordinarily like to put in the do not like section But it meant that we had a rather late dessert but we stayed for far longer at the table than we should have anyway we were having so much fun the staff was very patient with us even though they had to set up for breakfast in the morning   We visited the Corinthia again due to being very satisfied the first time round Once again the service was excellent and the attention to detail and the service with a smile attitude of staff was exemplary I was surprised that you could actually have a cigar in the patio area and I took advantage of this A fine Cuban cigar while seated on a comfy sofa next to a log fire super relaxing Thank you Bensa for the wonderful elderflower drink you prepared for my friend and I and for your service I also had dinner again with friends at the north Hall restaurant where we were again looked after by Giorgio Isaac and Alessio providing great service Asima gave a great recommendation for the wine the staff know their stuff for any wine buffs out there The Hake was super fresh and cooked to perfection the steak and ribeye was melt in the mouth and beautifully presented The desserts are very imaginative and delicious it s clear that a lot of thought and care was put in the menu and credit to the chefs for producing A class food it really is Michelin star worthy and I ve dined in Hotels with Michelin stars A big thank you to Giorgio for taking us on a tour of the lesser known private dining areas of the hotel which we may hire for a larger party in future Deya at the North Hall greeted us with a smile and made sure our meal with our friends was as enjoyable as possible Thank you Deya and to all at the Corinthia

Everything was absolutely perfect Spent one night after the marathon and it was a great place to relax Beds had lovely linen Breakfast was a delicious feast Spa was out of this world Worth every penny

The Hotel itself was great some guests were rather loud in the patio area which acts like an amplifier because of the architecture of the Hotel The laughs and shouting could be heard right up to the seventh floor where we were I did not complain as it was Easter and people were on holiday but shouting between balconies was not acceptable especially in the era of mobile phones This is not the Hotel s fault though This is due to disrespectful and in many cases drunk people s fault Although this shouting did not last too long my friend played Mozart on the violin from the sixth floor balcony all the shouting stopped I reckon everyone thought it was coming from the heavens   The staff were attentive to all our needs and requests The duty managers Daniel and Jean Phillipe were very helpful and gave a lot of their time to make sure we had a comfortable and relaxing stay The maids were polite and always wearing a smile The staff at the North Hall restaurant were particularly welcoming they granted us the table we chose and were a joy to speak to and the service was excellent Thank you to the manager Balasz and a special thanks to Alexi Deya Coco Lilly and to all the waiters And to the chef too The food was excellent We did not try the other restaurant of the Hotel as it was closed for Easter but we will soon as we ll definitely be re visiting the Corinthia Jason Clemence Nicole at the front desk were all very helpful It s the people who make a Hotel and full marks to the staff at the Corinthia for making us feel very welcome No staff had name tags but I remember their names because they connected with us in such a welcoming way on a daily basis that we remembered their names now that s a sign of how comfortable and memorable our experience was Kristina thank you for making us feel so welcome in the patio area and for the blanket The spa is something my wife used so she d be best qualified to give an opinion Unfortunately she went during child hours so it was a bit noisy But the times are clearly displayed on arrival on your TV screen and in booklets so no excuse there I did meet Michelle from the spa and look forward to using the spa when we go back My wife and I had a haircut styled by Ricky and Alex who were both excellent and fun to be with We talked so much that before we knew it our hair was done Overall great credit must go to the staff of this Hotel we will be returning for sure and we will be staying in one of the penthouses for a real special occasion

We did not get our newspapers delivered to the room in the mornings but we weren t really expecting the service anyway so we weren t too disturbed by it   The floral displays were beautiful The whole experience was the height of luxury it was expensive but worth the money The staff could not have been more friendly and helpful We went out for 90 minutes on the Saturday and set the light for the room to be made up and it was immaculate when we returned

On Saturday left my room at 12 30 expecting room to be cleaned in my return Returned at 3 45 pm not clean but was done as soon as I complained the response was poor they didn t know why it was cleaned

Unfortunately a brief stay We didn t find anything wrong in the little time we spent in the hotel We would definitely return   Very comfortable bed our room was plush and well maintained They seem to have anticipated all your needs as the room had everything you could possibly want Public areas beautifully kept and the spring flower displays were superb Good plentiful and tasty breakfast with very pleasant and helpful staff

Quality of the breakfast   The Hotel Staffs at the reception and for room services are extremely friendly and helpful Wide range of breakfast selections but the quality could be improved The Spa was amazing And the spa area is absolutely brilliant I would more than likely to visit this property again even just for the Spa experience

We were exploring the hotel having a look at the hall rooms as we were thinking about having our wedding reception at the corinthia when a security man stopped us and asked us to leave immediate He wasn t very pleasant to us and made us feel very uncomfortable and un welcome This was a shame because up until that experience we were having such a lovely time The rest of the staff were amazing especially the hotel receptionists who made us feel extremely welcome and comfortable   when we arrived we had been upgraded to the honeymoon suite as I had proposed to my fianc that day This was a lovely touch from Corinthia hotel and apreciated it very much

Had a wonderful stay over Christmas On the 25th we enjoyed couple of hours at the Spa which is absolutely fantastic We also appreciated the little gifts on our beds every day and the generous stocking left at our door on Christmas day

Breakfast selection was just ok not worth the 36 price if its not included in your room rate Ordered poached eggs first morning and they were not fully cooked so asked for them medium the 2nd morning and they were just the same not cooked properly Croissant s and sausages are good though I would give the breakfast a miss the next time I stay   Room was truly amazing with a TV in the large bath and the attention to detail was excellent the room was immaculate and an excellent size for being in London Pool area was amazing Staff were excellent and were very helpful Great location just a minutes walk to the embankment tube station Will definitely return next time we are in London

Only King Size Beds not Super King in all rooms up to and including a Junior Suite Some rooms road facing are prone to traffic noise even on the 7th floor   Facilities and decor are all excellent Quality of food and service in the Bassoon Bar and Massimo Restaurant were first class

Slight delay in checking in but as it was New Years Day and many guests had delayed their check out it wasn t a big problem  Stunning hotel close to the river The Spa facilities are the best we ve ever seen in England similar in standard to those in the best German or Dutch spas A pricey break but worth it for the luxury

I was told a sit down meal was 150 p p but our room service for two came to 90 total This could lead some people to pay much more than needed   The staff were amazing every need was catered for The food on the room service menu was some of the best I ve eaten the spa IS the best I ve been too in London The location is hard to rival

The concierge staff is not very helpful which is very surprising all other staff are so nice When I asked for assistance to change the number of persons for a lunch reservation at a restaurant he helped to call the restaurant passed the phone to me to talk to the restaurant directly I actually told him I needed to go out asked him to leave a message for me However he asked me to just wait a moment to see if he could get through I really didn t expect this kind of service from concierge from such a hotel   Reception staff very friendly helpful A particular room service staff is so polite set our table food perfectly Room is comfy nice Location is very convenient

the service in Massimo restaurant was poor but the food was excellent the amazing spa facilities were split by allowing children in who treated it understandably like a children s playground so not relaxing at all  The room was excellent and very quiet and comfortable location for central London ideal The cocktail bar was fantastic

The room needs a kettle to make tea there is a espresso machine which can heat the water but its tainted with coffee but the coffee is great  The staff were great and super accomodating the hotel has character unlike so many hotels the location is fabulous The rooms were well insulated no outside noise and the shower was the best

Breakfast selection In addition one night there was a disturbing group of guests that rang my door at 6 am The hotel just apologised with amenities not enough for me  Location SPA room comfort and size

The cheaper smaller rooms are in need of repair The carpets are coming away the cupboard doors don t shut properly and their are towels and water dropped all over the spa in areas where there shouldn t be any Just left there The high level of finesse that it is well known for was not apparent this time The concierge even struggled to recommend bars near St Paul s and said he d look on yelp   This hotel is not just great but one of the best in the world The only issue I have got with it is the price is getting higher but the standards are dropping

Absolutely nothing  Best hotel ever We loved this hotel every part of it Better than The Ritz or Four Seasons Food was excellent rooms are beautifully appointed and so comfortable bats and restaraunts were so beautiful service was outstanding Can t wait to go back and wish they had more hotels around the world

When we got too our bedroom we were very disappointed We were given a disability room We had red cords hanging from the ceiling over our bed The shower unit had chairs in it The toilet area hand four handles all around it The breakfast was the worst I ever had We ordered porridge the first morning we got there The porridge was a bowl of water The 2 bowels of porridge cost 17 sterling I asked for a baileys coffee in one of there restaurants The girl that served us didn t know how it was made She gave me a half glass of cold coffee with a drop of baileys in it This cost 17 sterling There was no chicken on the menu in the restaurant I had too ask for it They should accommodate people from other countries and give them what they want Google it if they have too find out how to make these things This is a five star hotel after all   The hotel was fab The staff were great Especially the concierge staff They were the best They helped us out with all of our tours
all was taken care of by Jochem Meijerink  Attention to detail and response in solving problems I think its to do with who is the leader and I give 100 to Jochem Meijerink Front Office Manager

Was assigned to a smaller than booked room but being quickly corrected the next day and waved extra bed for next 9 days of stay Thanks The smaller room is very clean and comfortable I would accept it if my wife didn t think it was too small The room cleaning staff had an issue The first few nights was fantastic Seventh night on the maid missed night turn down and next day didn t clean our room till four five o clock in the afternoon We were forced to wait for an hour and half for her to finish but we saw Matt Damon coming out of hotel for his new movie premier We told the hotel about the service was not done well even we turned up the make up room light Later the maid reflect her emotion to us The maid management does not match the rest of service One of the concierge rudely reply to us that he never heard about discount card for hotel guest at the outlet He spoke in a manner that going to outlet shopping is a low class behavior This is just a single incidence and can t represent the rest of hotel staff Majority of them are very fine Polite and proud of this hotel The ESPA looks very fine from photo and it looks even better once inside It also feature individual shower room It should be very nice experience but I just don t want to stay in there and continue to use For the jet massage I used once or twice and move to next After go around all spot I just want to take shower and leave Unlike in Swiss I want to keep using the facility for hours for this ESPA one hour is more than edequate including shower and dressing Probably it has to do with dark color environment   Clean and comfort vs price ratio Nice and polite doorman Excellent Italian restaurant and good tea pastries not rated

The set up on the room TV wasn t very good with some key UK channels missing and the screen seemed quite out of place At breakfast the staff didn t seem very engaged to help and the tables were small I was on a table for 4 but once my plate and cup were there there was little room for anything else There didn t appear to be any toast on offer if there was it wasn t obvious or offered For some reason I can t explain I felt the least comfortable and relaxed on my own at breakfast during both dinners restaurant staff were charming courteous and attentive but not overly so At breakfast it was appeared that all that mattered was customer turn round rather than customer service  I needed to escape a hectic working life and building work at home so booked a late deal and I wasn t sorry I loved the size of my room The bed was enormous everything had been thought of even an umbrella if you needed it The bathroom was well laid out and high spec Had breakfast in bed one morning which was excellent and made me feel very special Spent 6 hours in the ESPA Spa The back massage facial and scalp massage were incredible All the surroundings were relaxing with lots of spaces to kick back and relax Fantastic dinners in both restaurants I thought the beef carpaccio couldn t be beaten but the venison carpaccio was heavenly And well done for selling lobster thermador with thin fries perfect
